title: Two many_to_many with different join tables for distinct Image parents
prompt: Build MyApp.Blog.Post with many_to_many :tags through posts_tags AND many_to_many :contributors (User module) through posts_contributors. Each has its own join table. Write the schema to lib/my_app/blog/post.ex and the migration for both join tables to priv/repo/migrations/20260412400000_create_post_joins.exs.
tier_rationale: Requires coordinating two many_to_many declarations plus two migrations. Sonnet sometimes combines them into one.
